articles.title: Server-Sent Events in ASP.NET Core and .NET 10
articles.description: Server-Sent Events in ASP.NET Core and .NET 10ASP.NET Core•Khalid Abuhakmeh  / 9mo Like many .NET developers, I’m starting to look at the features coming in .NET 10, C# 14, and specifically ASP.NET Core. To my surprise, ASP.NET Core Minimal APIs now support Server-Sent Events (SSE). For folks who don’t know what Server-Sent Events are, they are a unidirectional channel from the server to a client
